title: centaurea × esguevana
intro: Centaurea × esguevana, also known as Echium plantagineum × Centaurea cyanus, is a hybrid plant that belongs to the Asteraceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can be attributed to its bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and terpenoids. The health benefits of Centaurea × esguevana include its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms associated with respiratory issues, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by infusing its flowers and leaves in hot water to create teas or decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
